creator: asomers@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've reproduced the bug with OpenJFX builds from r460608, r466648, and r468509.  I wasn't able to build OpenJFX at version 453790.  And I'm using TrueOS EDGE, which is based on FreeBSD 12.

> about
